label: 第112話
source_locator: 単行本13巻 目次 p.113
summary_short: 漏瑚は気絶した虎杖に宿儺の指を大量に飲ませ、宿儺を一時的に顕現させる。宿儺は美々子・菜々子と漏瑚の願いを聞くが、従う意思は示さない。
summary_full: 美々子と菜々子が一本の指を虎杖へ飲ませた後、漏瑚はさらに十本を一度に与え、宿儺を顕現させる。二人は夏油の肉体を返さない羂索を殺してほしいと願い、指の在りかを報酬に提示するが、宿儺は要求する立場を誤ったとして二人を斬殺する。漏瑚は宿儺へ完全復活後の協力を求め、宿儺は自分へ一撃でも当てられれば呪霊側へ加担すると条件を出して戦いを始める。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 漏瑚 does the best he can with his opportunity and feeds all the 宿儺 fingers in his possession to 悠仁 . This successfully revives 宿儺 for a temporary time period, but the King of Curses isn't to help inclined anyone. Still appreciative of the offerings, 宿儺 decides to hear whatever 菜々子 , 美々子 , and 漏瑚 have to ask of him.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: "Move." 漏瑚 finishes force-feeding all ten of 宿儺の指 in his possession to 悠仁. He believes 悠仁 has consumed fifteen fingers overall but his train of thought is interrupted by the sound of a cough. 漏瑚 looks over to see 美々子 and 菜々子. They're alive but they didn't manage to escape the station completely. 漏瑚 also notices their faces indicate they're afraid and surmises that they likely can't use another 術式 to get out of harm's way. The 呪霊 is too focused on the curse users and doesn't even realize the hand holding 悠仁's face has been cut off. 漏瑚 and the girls are both shocked as an ominous voice demands 漏瑚 move within one second. 漏瑚 darts away to position himself next to the 枷場 sisters. They're all nervous and sweating from the King of Curses' overwhelming presence. 漏瑚 notices that in comparison to 五条悟 , 宿儺's aura is filled with overpowering malice. 菜々子 believes even one movement will result in instant death. She tells herself to just breathe, but she's unsure if even that is safe. 漏瑚, 美々子, and 菜々子 are forced to prostrate themselves in 宿儺's presence. 宿儺 faces them and says they're holding their heads a little too high to be standing before him. The girls prostrate themselves and 漏瑚 gets down on one knee. 漏瑚's body moved on its own, but it's not low enough. 宿儺's technique creates a giant gash in the wall behind the trio that cuts off the top of 漏瑚's head. The 呪霊 begins to bleed profusely across his face and 宿儺 tells him one knee is still too high. 宿儺 adds that the boughs that bear most hang lowest but 漏瑚's head doesn't bear much at all now. 宿儺 walks up to the girls and asks them if there is anything he'd like to ask them. 菜々子 uses the chance to ask 宿儺 if he can free 夏油傑 by killing the person inhabiting his body. 菜々子 and 美々子 loved 傑 and even though 五条悟 killed him, they were still best friends. They're fine with allowing 悟 to exist but they want Pseudo-夏油 to die and regret what he's done. 菜々子 claims to know where another finger is and will tell 宿儺 in exchange for helping them. 菜々子 recalls her time with Master 夏油 as she asks 宿儺 to free him. 宿儺 tells the girls to raise their heads and gives them a smirk. Suddenly, 美々子's head is severed in a very violent fashion. Displeased, 宿儺 asks if 菜々子 thought she could order him around just for a few fingers. 菜々子's sister's blood splatters all over his face and she desperately calls out to her in anguish. Desperate for revenge, 菜々子 aims her cellphone camera at 宿儺 and attempts to activate her innate technique. 宿儺 activates his first and slices the top half of 菜々子's head clean off. He follows up by dismantling her entire body into tiny cubes, slicing her into nothing but a gruesome spray of blood. 宿儺 challenges 漏瑚 to battle. 宿儺 catches 菜々子's phone and surmises that the camera is connected to her 術式. He guesses it must be related to photographic manipulation and judges it as a boring technique. 宿儺 says 漏瑚 is next and asks what he needs. However, 漏瑚 doesn't claim to need anything. This confuses 宿儺 and 漏瑚 clarifies his objective is simply to fully revive him. 漏瑚 implores 宿儺 to make a 縛り that will let him take over 悠仁's body permanently using his friends as leverage. 宿儺 refuses and reveals he has his own plans, surprising 漏瑚. Amused by the 呪霊's desperation, 宿儺 offers a token of his appreciation for the ten fingers. He challenges 漏瑚 to land even one hit on him in a fight. If 漏瑚 can achieve this, 宿儺 agrees to work with his group for now and kill every human in 渋谷 except for one. 漏瑚 willingly accepts the deal and prepares for a jujutsu battle.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 虎杖悠仁 漏瑚 菜々子 枷場 美々子 枷場 宿儺 Pseudo-夏油 (回想) 夏油傑 (回想)
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 渋谷 渋谷駅 渋谷駅
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 宿儺の術式 御廚子 解 解

key_events_verified_phase6: 漏瑚が虎杖へ十本の宿儺の指を飲ませる
宿儺が一時的に肉体の主導権を得る
宿儺が美々子と菜々子を殺す
宿儺と漏瑚の戦闘が始まる
verification_notes_phase6: 集英社公式12～14巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第六段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
